dealSummary: Ineffable Intelligence, a London-based frontier AI lab, raised a $1.1 billion seed round led by Sequoia and Lightspeed.
Autonomous spacecraft systems developer True Anomaly received a $650 million Series D led by Eclipse and Riot Ventures.
Belgian biotech startup Coultreon Biopharma secured a $125 million Series A led by Sofinnova Investments.
Manifest OS, a legaltech startup, received a $60 million Series A from investors including Menlo Ventures, Kleiner Perkins and First Round Capital at a $750 million valuation.
leadInvestors: Menlo Ventures, Kleiner Perkins, First Round Capital

dealSummary: Liquid Instruments, a developer of testing and measurement tools, raised a $50 million Series C led by Keysight Technologies and the Australian government's National Reconstruction Fund Corporation.
leadInvestors: Keysight Technologies, the Australian government's National Reconstruction Fund Corporation

dealSummary: Semiconductor chip startup OpenLight secured a $50 million Series A1 led by Matter Venture Partners.
Actively, the developer of an AI-powered sales platform, raised a $45 million Series B led by TCV and First Harmonic.

London-based e-bike startup Forest secured an additional £27 million for its Series B from investors including Okai, B8 Venture Partners and Fen Ventures, bringing the round's total to £40 million, The Times reported.
leadInvestors: Okai, B8 Venture Partners, Fen Ventures

dealSummary: Copenhagen-based wealth management specialist Performativ raised a $14 million Series A led by Deutsche Börse Group.
Patronus, a Berlin-based startup making devices for older people, received €11 million in a round led by 3TS Capital Partners.
